Class EllipticArcClass

Namespace
ESRI.ArcGIS.Geometry
Assembly
ESRI.Server.Geometry.dll
[Guid("E54925BB-16D9-11D2-AA7A-00C04FA37BA4")]
[ClassInterface(ClassInterfaceType.None)]
public class EllipticArcClass : EllipticArc, IEllipticArc, ITransform2D, ICurve3, ICurve2, ISegment, ICurve, IGeometry, IConstructEllipticArc, IProximityOperator, ISupportErrorInfo, IClone, ISegmentM, ISegmentZ, ISegmentID

Densify segment into the specified number of smaller segments. This method is intended for internal use only.

<span style="COLOR: teal">IGeometry</span>
GetEnvelopeGeometry()</span></p>
<p class="MsoNormal" style=
"MARGIN: 0in 0in 0pt; LINE-HEIGHT: normal; mso-layout-grid-align: none">
<span style=
"FONT-SIZE: 10pt; FONT-FAMILY: 'Courier New'; mso-no-proof: yes"><span style="mso-spacerun: yes">
&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;</span> {</span></p>
<p class="MsoNormal" style=
"MARGIN: 0in 0in 0pt; LINE-HEIGHT: normal; mso-layout-grid-align: none">
<span style=
"FONT-SIZE: 10pt; FONT-FAMILY: 'Courier New'; mso-no-proof: yes"><span style="mso-spacerun: yes">
&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;</span>
<span style="COLOR: blue">const</span> <span style=
"COLOR: blue">double</span> DeltaX = 2.5;</span></p>
<p class="MsoNormal" style=
"MARGIN: 0in 0in 0pt; LINE-HEIGHT: normal; mso-layout-grid-align: none">
<span style=
"FONT-SIZE: 10pt; FONT-FAMILY: 'Courier New'; mso-no-proof: yes"><span style="mso-spacerun: yes">
&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;</span>
<span style="COLOR: blue">const</span> <span style=
"COLOR: blue">double</span> DeltaY = 2.5;</span></p>
<p class="MsoNormal" style=
"MARGIN: 0in 0in 0pt; LINE-HEIGHT: normal; mso-layout-grid-align: none">
<span style=
"FONT-SIZE: 10pt; FONT-FAMILY: 'Courier New'; mso-no-proof: yes"><span style="mso-spacerun: yes">
&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;</span>
<span style="COLOR: blue">const</span> <span style=
"COLOR: blue">double</span> DeltaZ = 2.5;</span></p>
<p class="MsoNormal" style=
"MARGIN: 0in 0in 0pt; LINE-HEIGHT: normal; mso-layout-grid-align: none">
<span style=
"FONT-SIZE: 10pt; FONT-FAMILY: 'Courier New'; mso-no-proof: yes">&nbsp;</span></p>
<p class="MsoNormal" style=
"MARGIN: 0in 0in 0pt; LINE-HEIGHT: normal; mso-layout-grid-align: none">
<span style=
"FONT-SIZE: 10pt; FONT-FAMILY: 'Courier New'; mso-no-proof: yes"><span style="mso-spacerun: yes">
&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;</span>
<span style="COLOR: teal">IPoint</span> centerPoint =
GetPoint();</span></p>
<p class="MsoNormal" style=
"MARGIN: 0in 0in 0pt; LINE-HEIGHT: normal; mso-layout-grid-align: none">
<span style=
"FONT-SIZE: 10pt; FONT-FAMILY: 'Courier New'; mso-no-proof: yes">&nbsp;</span></p>
<p class="MsoNormal" style=
"MARGIN: 0in 0in 0pt; LINE-HEIGHT: normal; mso-layout-grid-align: none">
<span style=
"FONT-SIZE: 10pt; FONT-FAMILY: 'Courier New'; mso-no-proof: yes"><span style="mso-spacerun: yes">
&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;</span>
<span style="COLOR: teal">IEnvelope</span> envelope = <span style=
"COLOR: blue">new</span> <span style=
"COLOR: teal">EnvelopeClass</span>();</span></p>
<p class="MsoNormal" style=
"MARGIN: 0in 0in 0pt; LINE-HEIGHT: normal; mso-layout-grid-align: none">
<span style=
"FONT-SIZE: 10pt; FONT-FAMILY: 'Courier New'; mso-no-proof: yes"><span style="mso-spacerun: yes">
&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;</span>
envelope.XMin = centerPoint.X - DeltaX;</span></p>
<p class="MsoNormal" style=
"MARGIN: 0in 0in 0pt; LINE-HEIGHT: normal; mso-layout-grid-align: none">
<span style=
"FONT-SIZE: 10pt; FONT-FAMILY: 'Courier New'; mso-no-proof: yes"><span style="mso-spacerun: yes">
&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;</span>
envelope.XMax = centerPoint.X + DeltaX;</span></p>
<p class="MsoNormal" style=
"MARGIN: 0in 0in 0pt; LINE-HEIGHT: normal; mso-layout-grid-align: none">
<span style=
"FONT-SIZE: 10pt; FONT-FAMILY: 'Courier New'; mso-no-proof: yes"><span style="mso-spacerun: yes">
&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;</span>
envelope.YMin = centerPoint.Y - DeltaY;</span></p>
<p class="MsoNormal" style=
"MARGIN: 0in 0in 0pt; LINE-HEIGHT: normal; mso-layout-grid-align: none">
<span style=
"FONT-SIZE: 10pt; FONT-FAMILY: 'Courier New'; mso-no-proof: yes"><span style="mso-spacerun: yes">
&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;</span>
envelope.YMax = centerPoint.Y + DeltaY;</span></p>
<p class="MsoNormal" style=
"MARGIN: 0in 0in 0pt; LINE-HEIGHT: normal; mso-layout-grid-align: none">
<span style=
"FONT-SIZE: 10pt; FONT-FAMILY: 'Courier New'; mso-no-proof: yes"><span style="mso-spacerun: yes">
&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;</span>
envelope.ZMin = centerPoint.Z - DeltaZ;</span></p>
<p class="MsoNormal" style=
"MARGIN: 0in 0in 0pt; LINE-HEIGHT: normal; mso-layout-grid-align: none">
<span style=
"FONT-SIZE: 10pt; FONT-FAMILY: 'Courier New'; mso-no-proof: yes"><span style="mso-spacerun: yes">
&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;</span>
envelope.ZMax = centerPoint.Z + DeltaZ;</span></p>
<p class="MsoNormal" style=
"MARGIN: 0in 0in 0pt; LINE-HEIGHT: normal; mso-layout-grid-align: none">
<span style=
"FONT-SIZE: 10pt; FONT-FAMILY: 'Courier New'; mso-no-proof: yes">&nbsp;</span></p>
<p class="MsoNormal" style=
"MARGIN: 0in 0in 0pt; LINE-HEIGHT: normal; mso-layout-grid-align: none">
<span style=
"FONT-SIZE: 10pt; FONT-FAMILY: 'Courier New'; mso-no-proof: yes"><span style="mso-spacerun: yes">
&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;</span>
MakeZAware(envelope <span style="COLOR: blue">as</span>
<span style="COLOR: teal">IGeometry</span>);</span></p>
<p class="MsoNormal" style=
"MARGIN: 0in 0in 0pt; LINE-HEIGHT: normal; mso-layout-grid-align: none">
<span style=
"FONT-SIZE: 10pt; FONT-FAMILY: 'Courier New'; mso-no-proof: yes">&nbsp;</span></p>
<p class="MsoNormal" style=
"MARGIN: 0in 0in 0pt; LINE-HEIGHT: normal; mso-layout-grid-align: none">
<span style=
"FONT-SIZE: 10pt; FONT-FAMILY: 'Courier New'; mso-no-proof: yes"><span style="mso-spacerun: yes">
&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;</span>
<span style="COLOR: blue">return</span> envelope <span style=
"COLOR: blue">as</span> <span style=
"COLOR: teal">IGeometry</span>;</span></p>
<p class="MsoNormal" style="MARGIN: 0in 0in 10pt"><span style=
"FONT-SIZE: 10pt; LINE-HEIGHT: 115%; FONT-FAMILY: 'Courier New'; mso-no-proof: yes">
<span style=
"mso-spacerun: yes">&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;</span>
}</span></p>
<p class="MsoNormal" style=
"MARGIN: 0in 0in 0pt; LINE-HEIGHT: normal; mso-layout-grid-align: none">
<span style=
"FONT-SIZE: 10pt; FONT-FAMILY: 'Courier New'; mso-no-proof: yes"><span style="mso-spacerun: yes">
&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;</span> <span style=
"COLOR: blue">private</span> <span style=
"COLOR: blue">static</span> <span style="COLOR: teal">IPoint</span>
GetPoint()</span></p>
<p class="MsoNormal" style=
"MARGIN: 0in 0in 0pt; LINE-HEIGHT: normal; mso-layout-grid-align: none">
<span style=
"FONT-SIZE: 10pt; FONT-FAMILY: 'Courier New'; mso-no-proof: yes"><span style="mso-spacerun: yes">
&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;</span> {</span></p>
<p class="MsoNormal" style=
"MARGIN: 0in 0in 0pt; LINE-HEIGHT: normal; mso-layout-grid-align: none">
<span style=
"FONT-SIZE: 10pt; FONT-FAMILY: 'Courier New'; mso-no-proof: yes"><span style="mso-spacerun: yes">
&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;</span>
<span style="COLOR: blue">const</span> <span style=
"COLOR: blue">double</span> Min = -10;</span></p>
<p class="MsoNormal" style=
"MARGIN: 0in 0in 0pt; LINE-HEIGHT: normal; mso-layout-grid-align: none">
<span style=
"FONT-SIZE: 10pt; FONT-FAMILY: 'Courier New'; mso-no-proof: yes"><span style="mso-spacerun: yes">
&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;</span>
<span style="COLOR: blue">const</span> <span style=
"COLOR: blue">double</span> Max = 10;</span></p>
<p class="MsoNormal" style=
"MARGIN: 0in 0in 0pt; LINE-HEIGHT: normal; mso-layout-grid-align: none">
<span style=
"FONT-SIZE: 10pt; FONT-FAMILY: 'Courier New'; mso-no-proof: yes">&nbsp;</span></p>
<p class="MsoNormal" style=
"MARGIN: 0in 0in 0pt; LINE-HEIGHT: normal; mso-layout-grid-align: none">
<span style=
"FONT-SIZE: 10pt; FONT-FAMILY: 'Courier New'; mso-no-proof: yes"><span style="mso-spacerun: yes">
&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;</span>
<span style="COLOR: teal">Random</span> random = <span style=
"COLOR: blue">new</span> <span style=
"COLOR: teal">Random</span>();</span></p>
<p class="MsoNormal" style=
"MARGIN: 0in 0in 0pt; LINE-HEIGHT: normal; mso-layout-grid-align: none">
<span style=
"FONT-SIZE: 10pt; FONT-FAMILY: 'Courier New'; mso-no-proof: yes">&nbsp;</span></p>
<p class="MsoNormal" style=
"MARGIN: 0in 0in 0pt; LINE-HEIGHT: normal; mso-layout-grid-align: none">
<span style=
"FONT-SIZE: 10pt; FONT-FAMILY: 'Courier New'; mso-no-proof: yes"><span style="mso-spacerun: yes">
&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;</span>
<span style="COLOR: blue">double</span> x = Min + (Max - Min) *
random.NextDouble();</span></p>
<p class="MsoNormal" style=
"MARGIN: 0in 0in 0pt; LINE-HEIGHT: normal; mso-layout-grid-align: none">
<span style=
"FONT-SIZE: 10pt; FONT-FAMILY: 'Courier New'; mso-no-proof: yes"><span style="mso-spacerun: yes">
&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;</span>
<span style="COLOR: blue">double</span> y = Min + (Max - Min) *
random.NextDouble();</span></p>
<p class="MsoNormal" style=
"MARGIN: 0in 0in 0pt; LINE-HEIGHT: normal; mso-layout-grid-align: none">
<span style=
"FONT-SIZE: 10pt; FONT-FAMILY: 'Courier New'; mso-no-proof: yes"><span style="mso-spacerun: yes">
&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;</span>
<span style="COLOR: blue">double</span> z = Min + (Max - Min) *
random.NextDouble();</span></p>
<p class="MsoNormal" style=
"MARGIN: 0in 0in 0pt; LINE-HEIGHT: normal; mso-layout-grid-align: none">
<span style=
"FONT-SIZE: 10pt; FONT-FAMILY: 'Courier New'; mso-no-proof: yes">&nbsp;</span></p>
<p class="MsoNormal" style=
"MARGIN: 0in 0in 0pt; LINE-HEIGHT: normal; mso-layout-grid-align: none">
<span style=
"FONT-SIZE: 10pt; FONT-FAMILY: 'Courier New'; mso-no-proof: yes"><span style="mso-spacerun: yes">
&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;</span>
<span style="COLOR: blue">return</span> ConstructPoint3D(x, y,
z);</span></p>
<p class="MsoNormal" style=
"MARGIN: 0in 0in 0pt; LINE-HEIGHT: normal; mso-layout-grid-align: none">
<span style=
"FONT-SIZE: 10pt; FONT-FAMILY: 'Courier New'; mso-no-proof: yes"><span style="mso-spacerun: yes">
&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;</span> }</span></p>
<p class="MsoNormal" style=
"MARGIN: 0in 0in 0pt; LINE-HEIGHT: normal; mso-layout-grid-align: none">
<span style=
"FONT-SIZE: 10pt; FONT-FAMILY: 'Courier New'; mso-no-proof: yes">&nbsp;</span></p>
<p class="MsoNormal" style=
"MARGIN: 0in 0in 0pt; LINE-HEIGHT: normal; mso-layout-grid-align: none">
<span style=
"FONT-SIZE: 10pt; COLOR: black; FONT-FAMILY: 'Courier New'; mso-no-proof: yes; mso-fareast-font-family: 'Times New Roman'">
<span style=
"mso-spacerun: yes">&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;</span></span>
<span style=
"FONT-SIZE: 10pt; COLOR: blue; FONT-FAMILY: 'Courier New'; mso-no-proof: yes; mso-fareast-font-family: 'Times New Roman'">
private</span> <span style=
"FONT-SIZE: 10pt; COLOR: blue; FONT-FAMILY: 'Courier New'; mso-no-proof: yes; mso-fareast-font-family: 'Times New Roman'">
static</span> <span style=
"FONT-SIZE: 10pt; COLOR: teal; FONT-FAMILY: 'Courier New'; mso-no-proof: yes; mso-fareast-font-family: 'Times New Roman'">
IPoint</span> <span style=
"FONT-SIZE: 10pt; COLOR: black; FONT-FAMILY: 'Courier New'; mso-no-proof: yes; mso-fareast-font-family: 'Times New Roman'">
ConstructPoint3D(</span><span style=
"FONT-SIZE: 10pt; COLOR: blue; FONT-FAMILY: 'Courier New'; mso-no-proof: yes; mso-fareast-font-family: 'Times New Roman'">double</span>
<span style=
"FONT-SIZE: 10pt; COLOR: black; FONT-FAMILY: 'Courier New'; mso-no-proof: yes; mso-fareast-font-family: 'Times New Roman'">
x,</span> <span style=
"FONT-SIZE: 10pt; COLOR: blue; FONT-FAMILY: 'Courier New'; mso-no-proof: yes; mso-fareast-font-family: 'Times New Roman'">
double</span> <span style=
"FONT-SIZE: 10pt; COLOR: black; FONT-FAMILY: 'Courier New'; mso-no-proof: yes; mso-fareast-font-family: 'Times New Roman'">
y,</span> <span style=
"FONT-SIZE: 10pt; COLOR: blue; FONT-FAMILY: 'Courier New'; mso-no-proof: yes; mso-fareast-font-family: 'Times New Roman'">
double</span> <span style=
"FONT-SIZE: 10pt; COLOR: black; FONT-FAMILY: 'Courier New'; mso-no-proof: yes; mso-fareast-font-family: 'Times New Roman'">
z)</span></p>
<p class="MsoNormal" style=
"MARGIN: 0in 0in 0pt; LINE-HEIGHT: normal; mso-layout-grid-align: none">
<span style=
"FONT-SIZE: 10pt; COLOR: black; FONT-FAMILY: 'Courier New'; mso-no-proof: yes; mso-fareast-font-family: 'Times New Roman'">
<span style=
"mso-spacerun: yes">&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;</span>
{</span></p>
<p class="MsoNormal" style=
"MARGIN: 0in 0in 0pt; LINE-HEIGHT: normal; mso-layout-grid-align: none">
<span style=
"FONT-SIZE: 10pt; COLOR: black; FONT-FAMILY: 'Courier New'; mso-no-proof: yes; mso-fareast-font-family: 'Times New Roman'">
<span style=
"mso-spacerun: yes">&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;</span></span>
<span style=
"FONT-SIZE: 10pt; COLOR: teal; FONT-FAMILY: 'Courier New'; mso-no-proof: yes; mso-fareast-font-family: 'Times New Roman'">
IPoint</span> <span style=
"FONT-SIZE: 10pt; COLOR: black; FONT-FAMILY: 'Courier New'; mso-no-proof: yes; mso-fareast-font-family: 'Times New Roman'">
point = ConstructPoint2D(x, y);</span></p>
<p class="MsoNormal" style=
"MARGIN: 0in 0in 0pt; LINE-HEIGHT: normal; mso-layout-grid-align: none">
<span style=
"FONT-SIZE: 10pt; COLOR: black; FONT-FAMILY: 'Courier New'; mso-no-proof: yes; mso-fareast-font-family: 'Times New Roman'">
<span style=
"mso-spacerun: yes">&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;</span>
point.Z = z;<br>
<br>
<span style=
"mso-spacerun: yes">&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;</span></span>
<span style=
"FONT-SIZE: 10pt; COLOR: blue; FONT-FAMILY: 'Courier New'; mso-no-proof: yes; mso-fareast-font-family: 'Times New Roman'">
return</span> <span style=
"FONT-SIZE: 10pt; COLOR: black; FONT-FAMILY: 'Courier New'; mso-no-proof: yes; mso-fareast-font-family: 'Times New Roman'">
point;</span></p>
<p class="MsoNormal" style=
"MARGIN: 0in 0in 0pt; LINE-HEIGHT: normal; mso-layout-grid-align: none">
<span style=
"FONT-SIZE: 10pt; COLOR: black; FONT-FAMILY: 'Courier New'; mso-no-proof: yes; mso-fareast-font-family: 'Times New Roman'">
<span style=
"mso-spacerun: yes">&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;</span>
}<br>
<br style="mso-special-character: line-break">
<br style="mso-special-character: line-break"></span></p>
<p class="MsoNormal" style=
"MARGIN: 0in 0in 0pt; LINE-HEIGHT: normal; mso-layout-grid-align: none">
<span style=
"FONT-SIZE: 10pt; COLOR: black; FONT-FAMILY: 'Courier New'; mso-no-proof: yes; mso-fareast-font-family: 'Times New Roman'">
<span style=
"mso-spacerun: yes">&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;</span></span>
<span style=
"FONT-SIZE: 10pt; COLOR: blue; FONT-FAMILY: 'Courier New'; mso-no-proof: yes; mso-fareast-font-family: 'Times New Roman'">
private</span> <span style=
"FONT-SIZE: 10pt; COLOR: blue; FONT-FAMILY: 'Courier New'; mso-no-proof: yes; mso-fareast-font-family: 'Times New Roman'">
static</span> <span style=
"FONT-SIZE: 10pt; COLOR: teal; FONT-FAMILY: 'Courier New'; mso-no-proof: yes; mso-fareast-font-family: 'Times New Roman'">
IPoint</span> <span style=
"FONT-SIZE: 10pt; COLOR: black; FONT-FAMILY: 'Courier New'; mso-no-proof: yes; mso-fareast-font-family: 'Times New Roman'">
ConstructPoint2D(</span><span style=
"FONT-SIZE: 10pt; COLOR: blue; FONT-FAMILY: 'Courier New'; mso-no-proof: yes; mso-fareast-font-family: 'Times New Roman'">double</span>
<span style=
"FONT-SIZE: 10pt; COLOR: black; FONT-FAMILY: 'Courier New'; mso-no-proof: yes; mso-fareast-font-family: 'Times New Roman'">
x,</span> <span style=
"FONT-SIZE: 10pt; COLOR: blue; FONT-FAMILY: 'Courier New'; mso-no-proof: yes; mso-fareast-font-family: 'Times New Roman'">
double</span> <span style=
"FONT-SIZE: 10pt; COLOR: black; FONT-FAMILY: 'Courier New'; mso-no-proof: yes; mso-fareast-font-family: 'Times New Roman'">
y)</span></p>
<p class="MsoNormal" style=
"MARGIN: 0in 0in 0pt; LINE-HEIGHT: normal; mso-layout-grid-align: none">
<span style=
"FONT-SIZE: 10pt; COLOR: black; FONT-FAMILY: 'Courier New'; mso-no-proof: yes; mso-fareast-font-family: 'Times New Roman'">
<span style=
"mso-spacerun: yes">&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;</span>
{</span></p>
<p class="MsoNormal" style=
"MARGIN: 0in 0in 0pt; LINE-HEIGHT: normal; mso-layout-grid-align: none">
<span style=
"FONT-SIZE: 10pt; COLOR: black; FONT-FAMILY: 'Courier New'; mso-no-proof: yes; mso-fareast-font-family: 'Times New Roman'">
<span style=
"mso-spacerun: yes">&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;</span></span>
<span style=
"FONT-SIZE: 10pt; COLOR: teal; FONT-FAMILY: 'Courier New'; mso-no-proof: yes; mso-fareast-font-family: 'Times New Roman'">
IPoint</span> <span style=
"FONT-SIZE: 10pt; COLOR: black; FONT-FAMILY: 'Courier New'; mso-no-proof: yes; mso-fareast-font-family: 'Times New Roman'">
point =</span> <span style=
"FONT-SIZE: 10pt; COLOR: blue; FONT-FAMILY: 'Courier New'; mso-no-proof: yes; mso-fareast-font-family: 'Times New Roman'">
new</span> <span style=
"FONT-SIZE: 10pt; COLOR: teal; FONT-FAMILY: 'Courier New'; mso-no-proof: yes; mso-fareast-font-family: 'Times New Roman'">
PointClass</span><span style=
"FONT-SIZE: 10pt; COLOR: black; FONT-FAMILY: 'Courier New'; mso-no-proof: yes; mso-fareast-font-family: 'Times New Roman'">();</span></p>
<p class="MsoNormal" style=
"MARGIN: 0in 0in 0pt; LINE-HEIGHT: normal; mso-layout-grid-align: none">
<span style=
"FONT-SIZE: 10pt; COLOR: black; FONT-FAMILY: 'Courier New'; mso-no-proof: yes; mso-fareast-font-family: 'Times New Roman'">
<span style=
"mso-spacerun: yes">&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;</span>
point.PutCoords(x, y);<br>
<span style="mso-spacerun: yes">&nbsp;</span></span></p>
<p class="MsoNormal" style=
"MARGIN: 0in 0in 0pt; LINE-HEIGHT: normal; mso-layout-grid-align: none">
<span style=
"FONT-SIZE: 10pt; COLOR: black; FONT-FAMILY: 'Courier New'; mso-no-proof: yes; mso-fareast-font-family: 'Times New Roman'">
<span style=
"mso-spacerun: yes">&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;</span></span>
<span style=
"FONT-SIZE: 10pt; COLOR: blue; FONT-FAMILY: 'Courier New'; mso-no-proof: yes; mso-fareast-font-family: 'Times New Roman'">
return</span> <span style=
"FONT-SIZE: 10pt; COLOR: black; FONT-FAMILY: 'Courier New'; mso-no-proof: yes; mso-fareast-font-family: 'Times New Roman'">
point;</span></p>
<p class="MsoNormal" style=
"MARGIN: 0in 0in 10pt; LINE-HEIGHT: normal"><span style=
"FONT-SIZE: 10pt; COLOR: black; FONT-FAMILY: 'Courier New'; mso-no-proof: yes; mso-fareast-font-family: 'Times New Roman'">
<span style=
"mso-spacerun: yes">&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;</span>
}</span></p>
<p class="MsoNormal" style=
"MARGIN: 0in 0in 0pt; LINE-HEIGHT: normal; mso-layout-grid-align: none">
<span style=
"FONT-SIZE: 10pt; FONT-FAMILY: 'Courier New'; mso-no-proof: yes"><span style="mso-spacerun: yes">
&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;</span> <span style=
"COLOR: blue">private</span> <span style=
"COLOR: blue">static</span> <span style="COLOR: blue">void</span>
MakeZAware(<span style="COLOR: teal">IGeometry</span>
geometry)</span></p>
<p class="MsoNormal" style=
"MARGIN: 0in 0in 0pt; LINE-HEIGHT: normal; mso-layout-grid-align: none">
<span style=
"FONT-SIZE: 10pt; FONT-FAMILY: 'Courier New'; mso-no-proof: yes"><span style="mso-spacerun: yes">
&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;</span> {</span></p>
<p class="MsoNormal" style=
"MARGIN: 0in 0in 0pt; LINE-HEIGHT: normal; mso-layout-grid-align: none">
<span style=
"FONT-SIZE: 10pt; FONT-FAMILY: 'Courier New'; mso-no-proof: yes"><span style="mso-spacerun: yes">
&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;</span>
<span style="COLOR: teal">IZAware</span> zAware = geometry
<span style="COLOR: blue">as</span> <span style=
"COLOR: teal">IZAware</span>;</span></p>
<p class="MsoNormal" style=
"MARGIN: 0in 0in 0pt; LINE-HEIGHT: normal; mso-layout-grid-align: none">
<span style=
"FONT-SIZE: 10pt; FONT-FAMILY: 'Courier New'; mso-no-proof: yes"><span style="mso-spacerun: yes">
&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;</span>
zAware.ZAware = <span style="COLOR: blue">true</span>;</span></p>
<p class="MsoNormal" style=
"MARGIN: 0in 0in 0pt; LINE-HEIGHT: normal; mso-layout-grid-align: none">
<span style=
"FONT-SIZE: 10pt; FONT-FAMILY: 'Courier New'; mso-no-proof: yes"><span style="mso-spacerun: yes">
&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;</span> }</span></p>

IGeometry_GeoNormalize()

Shifts longitudes, if need be, into a continuous range of 360 degrees.

virtual void IGeometry_GeoNormalize()

Examples

Sample Snippet

IGeometry_GeoNormalizeFromLongitude(double)

Normalizes longitudes into a continuous range containing the longitude. This method is obsolete.

virtual void IGeometry_GeoNormalizeFromLongitude(double Longitude)

Parameters

Longitude double

Examples

Sample Snippet

IGeometry_GeometryType

The type of this geometry.

virtual esriGeometryType IGeometry_GeometryType { get; }

Returns

esriGeometryType

Examples

Sample Snippet

IGeometry_IsEmpty

Indicates whether this geometry contains any points.

virtual bool IGeometry_IsEmpty { get; }

Returns

bool

Examples

Sample Snippet

IGeometry_Project(ISpatialReference) 

virtual void IGeometry_Project(ISpatialReference newReferenceSystem)

Parameters

newReferenceSystem ISpatialReference

IGeometry_QueryEnvelope(IEnvelope) 

virtual void IGeometry_QueryEnvelope(IEnvelope outEnvelope)

Parameters

outEnvelope IEnvelope

IGeometry_SetEmpty()

Removes all points from this geometry.

virtual void IGeometry_SetEmpty()

Examples

Sample Snippet

IGeometry_SnapToSpatialReference()

Moves points of this geometry so that they can be represented in the precision of the geometry's associated spatial reference system.

virtual void IGeometry_SnapToSpatialReference()

Examples

Sample Snippet

IGeometry_SpatialReference

The spatial reference associated with this geometry.

virtual ISpatialReference IGeometry_SpatialReference { get; set; }

Returns

ISpatialReference

Examples

Sample Snippet

ISegment_Dimension 

virtual esriGeometryDimension ISegment_Dimension { get; }

Returns

esriGeometryDimension

virtual IEnvelope ISegment_Envelope { get; }

Returns

IEnvelope

virtual IPoint ISegment_FromPoint { get; set; }

Returns

IPoint

ISegment_GeoNormalize() 

virtual void ISegment_GeoNormalize()

ISegment_GeoNormalizeFromLongitude(double) 

virtual void ISegment_GeoNormalizeFromLongitude(double Longitude)

Parameters

Longitude double

ISegment_GeometryType 

virtual esriGeometryType ISegment_GeometryType { get; }

Returns

esriGeometryType

ISegment_GetSubcurve(double, double, bool, out ICurve) 

virtual void ISegment_GetSubcurve(double fromDistance, double toDistance, bool asRatio, out ICurve outSubcurve)

Parameters

fromDistance double
toDistance double
asRatio bool
outSubcurve ICurve

ISegment_IsClosed 

virtual bool ISegment_IsClosed { get; }

Returns

bool

ISegment_IsEmpty 

virtual bool ISegment_IsEmpty { get; }

Returns

bool

ISegment_Length 

virtual double ISegment_Length { get; }

Returns

double

ISegment_Project(ISpatialReference) 

virtual void ISegment_Project(ISpatialReference newReferenceSystem)

Parameters

newReferenceSystem ISpatialReference

ISegment_QueryEnvelope(IEnvelope) 

virtual void ISegment_QueryEnvelope(IEnvelope outEnvelope)

Parameters

outEnvelope IEnvelope

ISegment_QueryFromPoint(IPoint) 

virtual void ISegment_QueryFromPoint(IPoint from)

Parameters

from IPoint

ISegment_QueryNormal(esriSegmentExtension, double, bool, double, ILine) 

virtual void ISegment_QueryNormal(esriSegmentExtension extension, double DistanceAlongCurve, bool asRatio, double Length, ILine normal)

Parameters

extension esriSegmentExtension
DistanceAlongCurve double
asRatio bool
Length double
normal ILine

ISegment_QueryPoint(esriSegmentExtension, double, bool, IPoint) 

virtual void ISegment_QueryPoint(esriSegmentExtension extension, double DistanceAlongCurve, bool asRatio, IPoint outPoint)

Parameters

extension esriSegmentExtension
DistanceAlongCurve double
asRatio bool
outPoint IPoint

ISegment_QueryPointAndDistance(esriSegmentExtension, IPoint, bool, IPoint, ref double, ref double, ref bool) 

virtual void ISegment_QueryPointAndDistance(esriSegmentExtension extension, IPoint inPoint, bool asRatio, IPoint outPoint, ref double DistanceAlongCurve, ref double distanceFromCurve, ref bool bRightSide)

Parameters

extension esriSegmentExtension
inPoint IPoint
asRatio bool
outPoint IPoint
DistanceAlongCurve double
distanceFromCurve double
bRightSide bool

ISegment_QueryTangent(esriSegmentExtension, double, bool, double, ILine) 

virtual void ISegment_QueryTangent(esriSegmentExtension extension, double DistanceAlongCurve, bool asRatio, double Length, ILine tangent)

Parameters

extension esriSegmentExtension
DistanceAlongCurve double
asRatio bool
Length double
tangent ILine

ISegment_QueryToPoint(IPoint) 

virtual void ISegment_QueryToPoint(IPoint to)

Parameters

to IPoint

ISegment_ReverseOrientation() 

virtual void ISegment_ReverseOrientation()

ISegment_SetEmpty() 

virtual void ISegment_SetEmpty()

ISegment_SnapToSpatialReference() 

virtual void ISegment_SnapToSpatialReference()

ISegment_SpatialReference 

virtual ISpatialReference ISegment_SpatialReference { get; set; }

Returns

ISpatialReference

ISegment_ToPoint

Parameters

asRatio bool
atPoint IPoint

IsCircular

Indicates if this elliptical arc is acutally circular (major and minor axes same length).

virtual bool IsCircular { get; }

Returns

bool

Examples

Sample Snippet

IsClosed 

virtual bool IsClosed { get; }

Returns

bool

IsCounterClockwise

Indicates if this elliptic arc is oriented counter-clockwise from its 'from' point to its 'to' point.

virtual bool IsCounterClockwise { get; set; }

Returns

bool

Examples

Sample Snippet

virtual bool IsEmpty { get; }

Returns

bool

Parameters

other IClone

Returns

bool

Parameters

other IClone

Returns

bool

IsLine

Indicates if the arc is degenerated to a line.

virtual bool IsLine { get; }

Returns

bool

Examples

Sample Snippet

IsMinor

Indicates whether the arc is a minor arc or a major arc.

virtual bool IsMinor { get; set; }

Returns

bool

Examples

Sample Snippet

IsPoint

Indicates if the arc is degenerated to a point.

virtual bool IsPoint { get; }

Returns

bool

baseTo WKSPoint
minOffset double
fromArcDistance double
toArcDistance double
maxOffset double
atArcDistance double
farPoint WKSPoint

dy double

SplitAtDistance(double, bool, out ISegment, out ISegment)

Split segment at specified distance.

virtual void SplitAtDistance(double distances, bool asRatio, out ISegment fromSegment, out ISegment toSegment)

Parameters

distances double
asRatio bool
fromSegment ISegment
toSegment ISegment

Examples

Sample Snippet

SplitAtVertexAttribute(esriGeometryAttributes, double, out ISegment, out ISegment)

Splits the segment in two segments at the location corresponding to the attribute value.

virtual void SplitAtVertexAttribute(esriGeometryAttributes attributeType, double attributeValue, out ISegment fromSegment, out ISegment toSegment)

Parameters

attributeType esriGeometryAttributes
attributeValue double
fromSegment ISegment
toSegment ISegment

Examples

Sample Snippet

SplitDivideLength(double, double, bool, ref int, ref ISegment)

Divide segment into smaller segments of the specified length.

virtual void SplitDivideLength(double Offset, double Length, bool asRatio, ref int numSplitSegments, ref ISegment splitSegments)

Parameters

Offset double
Length double
asRatio bool
numSplitSegments int
splitSegments ISegment

VertexAttributeAware[esriGeometryAttributes]

Indicates if the segment is aware of the specified attribute type.

virtual bool VertexAttributeAware[esriGeometryAttributes attributeType] { get; set; }

Parameters

attributeType esriGeometryAttributes

Returns

bool

Examples

Sample Snippet

VertexAttributeOn(esriGeometryAttributes, double)

Indicates if attributeValue is located on this segment.

Parameters

attributeType esriGeometryAttributes
attributeValue double
